task_title: Verify CONFIGURATION.md, INSTALL.md, and USAGE.md claims
false_positives_removed: configdoc-014 — RAG_RERANKING_ENABLED default is actually correct, explorer flagged it for verification

findings.title: Settings storage path contradicts code: AppData/DocumentQA vs AFOMIS Help and Support
findings.problem: CONFIGURATION.md line 26 claims settings stored at 'AppData/DocumentQA/app_settings.json'. Code (app_paths.py:25,69) uses '%LOCALAPPDATA%\AFOMIS Help and Support\settings.json'. Both path AND filename are wrong.

findings.title: Backend priority order: Ollama and OpenAI positions swapped
findings.problem: CONFIGURATION.md line 264 lists Ollama at position 3 and OpenAI at position 4. Code (llm_interface.py:389-407) checks API (position 3) before Ollama (position 4).
findings.fix: Swap positions 3 and 4: OpenAI API (position 3), Ollama (position 4)

findings.title: RAG_CHUNK_SIZE default documented as 256, code defaults to 512
findings.problem: CONFIGURATION.md line 40 documents default 256. Code (api_server.py:385, engine_factory.py:187) defaults to 512.

findings.title: RAG_DB_PATH default misleading: shows ./doc_qa_db, code uses AFOMIS path
findings.problem: CONFIGURATION.md documents ./doc_qa_db as default. Code (rag_engine.py:45) uses app_paths.get_vector_db_path() which resolves to %LOCALAPPDATA%\AFOMIS Help and Support\data\vector_db.
findings.fix: Update default to the actual AFOMIS path or clarify that ./doc_qa_db is for CLI mode only.

findings.title: Phantom env vars: RAG_TOP_P and RAG_DO_SAMPLE documented but never read
findings.problem: CONFIGURATION.md documents RAG_TOP_P and RAG_DO_SAMPLE as environment variables. grep confirms zero matches across all .py files — these env vars are never read by any code.
findings.fix: Remove RAG_TOP_P and RAG_DO_SAMPLE from documentation.

findings.title: RAG_RETRIEVAL_WINDOW default documented as 0, code defaults to 1
findings.problem: CONFIGURATION.md documents default 0. Code (engine_factory.py:194) defaults to 1.

findings.title: CLI --reranking flag documented but doesn't exist in main.py
findings.problem: USAGE.md documents 'python main.py --reranking' but main.py has no --reranking argument.
findings.fix: Remove or update example to document that reranking is configured via settings file.

findings.title: Config JSON example max_tokens mismatch
findings.problem: CONFIGURATION.md JSON example shows max_tokens: 512. RAGConfig class default is 1024, though from_dict defaults to 512 for backward compat.
findings.fix: Update example to 1024 to match RAGConfig class default, or add note about backward compatibility.

findings.title: GUI settings JSON example uses wrong db_path
findings.problem: CONFIGURATION.md example shows db_path as 'C:\Users\User\AppData\Roaming\DocumentQA\doc_qa_db'. Actual path is %LOCALAPPDATA%\AFOMIS Help and Support\data\vector_db.
findings.fix: Update example path to match actual code behavior.

findings.title: Config JSON example retrieval_window is 0, should be 1
findings.problem: CONFIGURATION.md JSON example shows retrieval_window: 0. Engine factory defaults to 1.

findings.title: CLI --api-key argument documented but doesn't exist
findings.problem: USAGE.md shows '--api-key "sk-..."' but main.py has no --api-key argument.
findings.fix: Remove from example; document that API key must be set via RAG_API_KEY env var if needed.

findings.title: RAG_API_MODEL description unclear
findings.problem: CONFIGURATION.md lists RAG_API_MODEL with description 'API model name' — unclear what API this refers to. Should specify 'OpenAI-compatible API model name'.
findings.fix: Update description to 'OpenAI-compatible API model name (e.g., gpt-4, gpt-3.5-turbo)'

findings.title: RAG_DEVICE env var not documented
findings.problem: RAG_DEVICE is read by code (engine_factory.py:206, api_server.py:434) but not listed in CONFIGURATION.md env vars table.
findings.fix: Add RAG_DEVICE to the env vars table with description and default.
